title: Road Construction & Surfacing
description: Road bed preparation, layer works, asphalt surfacing, and interlocking block paving.

images.alt: Freshly laid asphalt surface stretching along a newly constructed road with red soil shoulders on either side
images.title: Asphalt Surfacing & Laying

images.alt: Grader compacting and shaping a wide roadbed base layer on a residential road under construction
images.title: Roadbed Compaction & Layer Works

images.alt: Long stretch of completed interlocking paving block sidewalk running alongside a road through open farmland
images.title: Interlocking Paving Block Sidewalks

images.alt: Aerial view of freshly installed interlocking paving blocks and precast concrete kerbing along a road at sunset
images.title: Precast Concrete Kerbing

images.alt: Worker in PPE inspecting a concrete lined road channel during roadbed profiling and drainage operations
images.title: Roadbed Profiling Operations

images.alt: Workers in PPE laying interlocking paving blocks on a completed residential roadway in a suburban area
images.title: Completed Surfaced Roadway

images.alt: Installation of interlocking block paving alongside road kerbing
images.title: Interlocking Block Paving

images.alt: Constructed traffic roundabout with paved apron and concrete kerbing
images.title: Roundabout Construction & Paving

images.alt: Road rollers compacting a newly surfaced road layer
images.title: Road Surfacing & Compaction

images.alt: Makhaswa road crew laying base layer gravel on an active roadbed development site
images.title: Roadbed Base Layering
